title: Rethinking the Comparison Between the War in Ukraine and the Spanish Civil War
gist: Podcast episode notes (members-only teaser) for The Insider: an interview with Andrew Mitchell, author of an article questioning the increasingly common analogy between the war in Ukraine and the 1936-1939 Spanish Civil War, and the difficulty of drawing historical lessons for today.

insights.claim: There is growing analyst discussion comparing the war in Ukraine today with the Spanish Civil War of 1936-1939, an analogy Andrew Mitchell argues is problematic.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Cautions against over-reading historical analogies when forecasting how the Ukraine war evolves.
